title: Release Notes
description: Structured release data for the guided demo engine. Consumed by Release Mode in the app.

gitHash.description: Short git hash of last processed commit (optional)

features.description: User-facing features for the guided tour

description.description: Optional longer description of the feature

include.description: Whether to include in the tour (admin can toggle)

instructions.description: Step-by-step instructions for the guided tour

Demo.description: Demo content to load before showing this feature

loadSample.description: Sample file path to load (e.g. breakbeat_slices.wav). Relative to demo assets.

loadProjectState.description: Project state JSON to restore (e.g. slice-demo.json)

sourcePath.description: Virtual path to navigate source pane to

destPath.description: Virtual path to navigate dest pane to

text.description: Instruction text shown in the top area

highlight.description: Selector for UI element to highlight. Use data-testid (e.g. [data-testid="format-settings-button"]) or CSS selector.

action.description: Optional: auto-perform action when step is shown

waitFor.description: Selector to wait for before advancing (e.g. dialog open)
